title: Lucid Group Inc (LCID) Q1 2024 Earnings: Surpasses Revenue Estimates But Widens Losses
text: Lucid Group Inc reported Q1 2024 earnings with revenue of $172.7 million, exceeding analyst estimates of $156.99 million. The company manufactured 1,728 vehicles and delivered 1,967 units, representing a 39.9% year-over-year increase in deliveries. However, the company posted a net loss of $680.9 million, surpassing analyst estimates. Loss per share reached $0.30, exceeding the projected $0.25 loss. The company ended the quarter with approximately $5.03 billion in total liquidity, bolstered by a $1.0 billion private placement. Negative free cash flow totaled $714.9 million, though this represented an improvement from the prior year's -$1.04 billion. Despite beating revenue expectations, Lucid's expanding losses underscore the capital-intensive nature of scaling EV production. The company maintained a strong cash position of $2.17 billion while managing elevated research and development expenses totaling $284.6 million.
